Color:White, Yellow, Orange, Red, Green, Blue

Type: Baseball

Brand New and High Quality

Size: 7×7cm(2.76×2.76in)

Material: PU

Packaging Includes: 1PC Baseball

Feature:

1.Manufactured with PU sponge material, and can be used for a long time.

2.It is lightweight, adults can throw and press as much as they want at a certain degree

3.The bright colors allow you to practice your swing when indoor lighting is insufficient.

4.Enough quantity can satisfy your needs, allow you enjoy a very interesting sports with your .

5.It is a nice choices for those beginners and people who want to practice playing baseballs.

Tips:

1.Due to the light and monitors effect, colors may have lightly difference.

2.Please allow slightly size errors due to manual measurement. Thank you for your understanding!

title: Ryuji Ohtani Home Run & Steal Baseball Commemorative Ball

High-Quality Material Crafted from premium materials, this baseball offers a superior grip and durability for collectors and enthusiasts. title: Safe Softball for Children and Youth
detail_text: Versatile Use Ideal for both rubber glove practice and solid sponge ball games, catering to various skill levels and preferences. Safety Features Designed with safety in mind, this soft-style baseball minimizes the risk of injury during play. Ideal for Youth Specifically designed for children and teenagers, this baseball enhances their baseball skills and enjoyment. Easy Storage Its compact size makes it easy to store, perfect for home or travel use. Premium Quality Crafted with premium materials, this baseball ensures durability and longevity, perfect for children and teenagers.
detail_html:
Versatile Use



Ideal for both rubber glove practice and solid sponge ball games, catering to various skill levels and preferences.






Safety Features



Designed with safety in mind, this soft-style baseball minimizes the risk of injury during play.






Ideal for Youth



Specifically designed for children and teenagers, this baseball enhances their baseball skills and enjoyment.






Easy Storage



Its compact size makes it easy to store, perfect for home or travel use.






Premium Quality



Crafted with premium materials, this baseball ensures durability and longevity, perfect for children and teenagers.

title: Training Hard Baseball
detail_text: Standard Size and Weight With a standard size of 9 inches in circumference and a weight of 5 ounces, this baseball adheres to the official dimensions for competitive play. No Logo Design This blank baseball without any logo allows for personalized branding or team identification, enhancing team spirit and unity. Affordable Training Ball At an unbeatable price, this baseball provides excellent value for school teams and amateur leagues looking for cost-effective training tools. Plastic Sealed Packaging Each baseball comes with plastic sealing, ensuring the product's freshness and preventing any damage during transportation. Premium Material Crafted with premium cowhide and wool binding, this baseball offers durability and wear resistance for intensive training sessions.
detail_html:
Standard Size and Weight



With a standard size of 9 inches in circumference and a weight of 5 ounces, this baseball adheres to the official dimensions for competitive play.






No Logo Design



This blank baseball without any logo allows for personalized branding or team identification, enhancing team spirit and unity.






Affordable Training Ball



At an unbeatable price, this baseball provides excellent value for school teams and amateur leagues looking for cost-effective training tools.






Plastic Sealed Packaging



Each baseball comes with plastic sealing, ensuring the product's freshness and preventing any damage during transportation.






Premium Material



Crafted with premium cowhide and wool binding, this baseball offers durability and wear resistance for intensive training sessions.
